_comment: Feature flag config for MY-ACCOUNT-ONLY testing.
_warning: Only my account gets these flags. All other users see default (OFF) behavior.

virtualized_customer_list.description: Virtualized customer list (NOT enabled even for me yet)

new_dashboard_metrics.description: New dashboard metrics (NOT enabled even for me yet)

_how_to_use.step_2: Replace YOUR_EMAIL@example.com with your account email
_how_to_use.step_3: Replace YOUR_FIREBASE_UID with your Firebase Auth UID (optional but recommended)
_how_to_use.step_4: Set enabled: true only for flags you want to test
_how_to_use.step_5: Open the preview URL → login with YOUR_EMAIL → feature is active
_how_to_use.step_6: Any other user → feature stays OFF
